method_notes: Second demo snapshot, 12h after the first, hand-curated to show realistic rank churn (Yoon trial moves up; Cho Kuk Innovation Party enters new; US-Korea trade drops off).

topics.summary: Major court session expected today; defense and prosecution exchanging filings on key witness order. Coverage saturating Korean political news.
One-year mark approaching; Korea Gallup and Realmeter weekly approval polls due tomorrow. Op-eds split on whether the trajectory is sustainable.
Seoul mayoral primary debates scheduled; DPK candidate field tightening to two front-runners. PPP primary still wide open.
Acting leadership announces party-direction reset following founder Cho Kuk's December 2024 prison sentence; emergency convention reportedly being discussed.
Bank of Korea housing-price index update due this week; Seoul apartment listings show modest cooling, opposition continuing critique.
Weekend missile-test response cycle continuing; defense ministry briefings have downshifted from emergency to scheduled.
Interim leadership decisions delayed again; faction meetings scheduled this week. Pre-local-election timeline tightening.
Two more Seoul gu primaries appealing procedural rulings to the central committee; resolution expected by end of week.
